howItWorks.intro: This caffeine half-life calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Health metrics are general guidelines. Consult your healthcare provider for personalized medical advice.

faq.question: What is caffeine half-life?
faq.answer: Caffeine half-life is about 5 hours for most adults. This means if you drink 200mg, you still have 100mg in your system 5 hours later. It varies by genetics, age, and liver function.

faq.question: How does caffeine affect sleep?
faq.answer: Caffeine consumed within 6 hours of bedtime significantly disrupts sleep quality, even if you fall asleep fine. The rule of thumb: stop caffeine 8-10 hours before bed.

faq.question: How much caffeine is in common drinks?
faq.answer: Coffee (8oz): 95mg. Espresso: 63mg. Black tea: 47mg. Green tea: 28mg. Cola: 34mg. Energy drink: 80-300mg. Caffeine pills: usually 200mg.

faq.question: Can I build caffeine tolerance?
faq.answer: Yes — regular consumption reduces its stimulant effects. A 1-2 week break (caffeine fast) resets tolerance. Withdrawal symptoms (headache, fatigue) last 2-9 days.

faq.question: Is the Caffeine Half-Life Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

sections.title: What Is the Caffeine Half-Life Calculator?
sections.body: The Caffeine Half-Life Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your caffeine, hours since consumed, you get instant results including caffeine remaining, time to half dose. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting caffeine remaining right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your caffeine and need to find the right caffeine remaining. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.
